description: Native American English. Male, late teens (about 17). Clear, high-quality. Persona: withdrawal-native teen. Emotion: flat, contained, undeceived. A young, changing-into-settled male voice, quiet and clipped, with a flat working Detroit accent. Even and low-key, short plain statements with no padding and no feeling laid on top of the words.
text: It works fine. [tired] That's the problem. We don't need the apps... or some company's permission. [deliberate] Just make it ring. We want the house to know when somebody's at the door.
